scenario: A support agent inspects the host app's state root instead of the companion's own credential store while triaging a session issue.
expected_signal: support reads the companion-owned mutable_state and credential_store roots recorded for the artifact
observed_signal: support reads an unrelated state root and misses the companion's recorded credential store
resolves_to: Point support at the artifact's recorded roots so the correct, redacted credential store is inspected.
